source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/05_HnX-P1, HnX-PB/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/1. Power cable/1.1, 1.5 LA-C-4446/LA-C-4446(LP-34A+LS-18N)3903-001253_종이타이 변경 _23.12.1.pdf

document.title: SPECIFICATION FOR APPROVAL
document.documentType: Product specification approval for European power cord

sourceSummary.oneLine: Longwell specification approval document for European power cord set LP-34A, H05VV-F 0.75/3C, and LS-18N under customer part number 3903-001253.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used for customer approval of specification and samples and for completion of ISO 9001 procedures.
keyPoints: The document describes a European type power supply cord set with thermoplastic insulation.
The cord set is stated to be in accordance with IEC 60884-1, K 60884-1, IEC 60227, K 60227, IEC 60320-1, and K 60320-1 standards.
The records of amendment identify GW-00023 Rev:4 with the change description Add the label.
The VDE certificate section identifies Certificate No. 121253 for flexible cables with thermoplastic PVC insulation.

entities.name: VDE Prüf- und Zertifizierungsinstitut GmbH
entities.evidence: VDE Prüf- und Zertifizierungsinstitut GmbH VDE Testing and Certification Institute

concepts.name: VDE Marks Approval
concepts.evidence: This Marks Approval is a basis for the EC Declaration of Conformity and the CE Marking

evidence.claim: The document is a specification for approval.
The described product is a European power cord.
The power supply cord set is stated to be in accordance with IEC 60884-1, K 60884-1, IEC 60227, K 60227, IEC 60320-1, and K 60320-1.
evidence.evidenceText: European type power supply cord set with thermoplastic insulation in accordance with:IEC 60884-1; K 60884-1; IEC 60227;K60227and IEC 60320-1;K60320-1 standards.

evidence.claim: The plug type is LP-34A rated 16A 250V.
The connector type is LS-18N rated 2.5A 250V.
The records of amendment include GW-00023 Rev:4 with change description Add the label.
VDE Certificate No. 121253 applies to flexible cables with thermoplastic PVC insulation.
evidence.evidenceText: Certificate No. 121253 ... Cables for general applications - Flexible cables with thermoplastic PVC insulation

evidence.claim: The VDE marks approval is a basis for EC Declaration of Conformity and CE Marking.
evidence.evidenceText: This Marks Approval is a basis for the EC Declaration of Conformity and the CE Marking by the manufacturer or his agent

evidence.claim: Products containing dimethylfumarate may not be marketed or made available on the EC market according to Commission Decision 2009/251/EC.
evidence.evidenceText: Products containing the biocide dimethylfumarate (DMF) may not be marketed or made available on the EC market according to the Commission Decision 2009/251/EC.

reviewFlags.reason: The MODEL NO. field on the cover page is blank; productModels were inferred from component and part identifiers stated elsewhere in the document.
Large portions of the product safety certificate pages contain low-quality OCR text with corrupted characters.
The document contains both specification approval content and embedded certificate/supplement content from VDE, so authority context is mixed.
